name: Strawberry Rhubard Pie (Lf)
recipeIngredient: 1 Perfect Pie Crust (see recipe with same name)
3 cups Fresh or frozen unsweetened strawberries; defrost
recipeInstructions:
3 1/2 tablespoons Cornstarch
1/4 cup Juice from frozen berries or water
1/3 cup Sugar
Preheat oven to 450°F. Make the pre-baked pie crust.
In a bowl combine the rhubarb, strawberries, cornstarch, water or juice, and sugar. Mix well to coat the fruit with cornstarch and sugar, then let sit for 10 minutes.
Fill the pre-baked pie shell with the fruit mixture. Cover the edges of the crust with foil to prevent browning.
Bake for 10 minutes at 450°F, then reduce heat to 350°F, and continue baking for 25 to 30 minutes. Remove the pie from the oven, and let it cool to room temperature before serving.
